title: clusia cajamarcensis
intro: Clusia cajamarcensis, also known as the Clusia plant, is a species of plant in the Clusiaceae family, native to Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Clusia plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Clusia cajamarcensis may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and alleviate respiratory problems.
